Special Transformer

Oil-Immersed Split Transformer

Special oil-immersed split transformer for project-specific electrical systems.

Get a QuoteProduct Inquiry

Product Tags

Oil-immersedSplit transformerSpecial transformer
Back to product matrix

Overview

The brochure lists oil-immersed split transformer under transformer equipment. Extracted technical data indicates input and output voltage, rated capacity options and neutral grounding modes for the product family.

Applications

  • Project-specific industrial power systems
  • Renewable energy electrical systems
  • Special power conversion systems

Key Features

  • Input and output side data is shown in brochure
  • Capacity options listed in brochure tables
  • Grounded or ungrounded neutral modes referenced

Product Advantages

  • Can be engineered for project-specific requirements

Technical Parameters

Typical technical data from brochure. Final design can be customized according to project requirements.

Rated voltage input0.54 / 0.69 / 0.8 / 0.95 / 1.14 kV
Rated voltage output12 / 40.5 kV
Rated frequency50 Hz
Rated capacity examples900, 1250, 1600, 2000, 2500, 3150, 3300, 3500, 4000 kVA
Rated short-time withstand voltage input5 kV / 1 min
Rated short-time withstand voltage output85 kV / 1 min
Neutral grounding modeGrounded / ungrounded

To be confirmed from final datasheet.

  • Project-specific design based on inquiry
